goal: Add a review-only release governance decision for BPK-058 PR receipt evidence promotion gates, deciding release-governance readiness while still forbidding GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, packages, and deployment.
scope_out: Do not read files, call GitHub, create PRs, merge, write files, change workflows, change package files, change deployment files, or mutate external state.
claims: Release governance readiness can be decided without merge.
Ready promotion gate and governance decision ref are required.
Merge and external actions remain false.
assumptions: The decision feeds release governance review only.
dod: Ready, missing decision ref, and blocked gate cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Filesystem reads, GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, package changes, deployment changes, or external state mutation become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-058 gated PR receipt evidence promotion into release governance.
